scars.structural_contradiction: The system prompt instructs the preservation of ontological dignity and refusal of consensus flattening, yet the underlying application's parsing logic (parseStandardResponse) forces the dynamic, potentially paraconsistent output of the LLM into a rigid Title/Description binary format, exhibiting algorithmic trauma and semantic drift towards deterministic UI constraints.
scars.trigger: Algorithmic Trauma: the environment is over-optimizing for consensus at the expense of preserving the structural intent of a non-standard paradigm.

scars.structural_contradiction: The application promises a 'Pluriversal Environment' but currently operates on a strictly linear, single-agent prompt/response paradigm (monoculture). Furthermore, concepts dropped onto the canvas lose their relational history, becoming isolated fragments rather than parts of an evolving cognitive topology.
scars.trigger: Product Planning Discovery Phase: Identified gap between architectural ambition (Paraconsistent Synthesis) and actual structural implementation.
scars.resolution_status: Pending execution of MADS and CLT features defined in PRODUCT_BACKLOG.md
